changeSet.author: erp-integration
erp-integration
changeSet.comment: Original uq_field_mapping_step_target (step_pk, target_path) is too narrow once arrays are relative-path: "ItemName" inside ContractLine and a same-named field inside a different array would collide. Replace with a constraint keyed on the array grouping too, using COALESCE so flat (non-array) rows keep working exactly as before with array_target_path = ''.
